_comment: Merge this into your ~/.claude/settings.json. Do not overwrite blindly.

hooks._comment_hooks: Notification + Stop require terminal-notifier: brew install terminal-notifier

hooks.command: terminal-notifier -title Claude -message 'Needs your input' -sound Glass -activate com.mitchellh.ghostty -ignoreDnD
terminal-notifier -title Claude -message 'Ready for input' -sound Pop -activate com.mitchellh.ghostty

_comment_plugins: Recommended combination — pick ONE from each category to avoid agent conflicts

_plugin_categories.avoid: Do NOT enable multiple plugins that each define a code-reviewer agent
